planner.title: RSVP & invitations
planner.subtitle: Build the forms your guests fill in and review their answers.
planner.privateWebsiteNotice: Your wedding website asks visitors for a code because you use invitations with a passcode. If you only use an open invitation without a code, your website stays public.

empty.flows: No invitations yet. Create one to let guests RSVP.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.description: This deletes the invitation and all {{count}} of its responses. This cannot be undone.

editor.description: An invitation defines what guests see when they RSVP. Either create one open invitation (no passcode) or several passcode-protected invitations.

fields.name: Name (only you see this)
fields.requirePasscodeHelp: Guests must enter this code before they can RSVP.
fields.plusOneHelp: Guests can add one extra attendee.

questions.title: Custom questions
questions.emptyHint: Only the base questions (name, surname, email, dietary) will be shown.

events.title: Events guests can RSVP to
events.newHint: New events are added to your wedding and shown on this invitation.
events.incomplete: New events need a name, start time and location.

notAvailable.title: RSVP not available
notAvailable.description: The couple hasn’t opened RSVPs yet. Please check back later.

gate.title: Enter your passcode
gate.description: You should have received this with your invitation.
gate.error: That passcode didn’t work. Please check with the couple.

form.title: RSVP
form.description: We can’t wait to celebrate with you. Please fill in your details below.
form.eventsHint: Select the events you’ll attend. Leave them all unchecked if you can’t make it.

errors.duplicate: An RSVP with this name and email already exists for this wedding.
errors.generic: Something went wrong submitting your RSVP. Please try again.
